note: 2026-06-01 full window (53 completed runs, 96.2% success — best in 14-day window). Only 2 failures, and BOTH are the SAME class: safe-output target=* partial-failure-intolerance (Contribution Check RECURRENCE + Smoke Claude NEW). This class is now the dominant and only recurring failure mode. THREE other classes went quiet this window: token-budget-429 (#35661) did NOT recur (heaviest eff_tok 22.5M < 25M cap), threat-detection-missing-prompt did NOT recur, pr-branch-deleted-race did NOT recur. No cost outlier.

issues.title: TOP & ONLY recurring failure mode: one invalid/failed safe-output item (target=* with no resolvable number) red-fails the WHOLE safe_outputs job even when other items succeeded — now 6 distinct workflows
issues.detail: Both of today's 2 failures are this class. (A) Contribution Check 26784313244 (copilot/sonnet-4.6): an add_comment item had target=* with NO item_number on a SCHEDULE event ('Message 3 (add_comment) failed: Target is "*" but no item_number/issue_number/pull_request_number specified'). That single failed item red-failed the whole safe_outputs job DESPITE create_issue (#aw_summary) + add_labels succeeding. This is a RECURRENCE on Contribution Check specifically (also hit 05-30). (B) Smoke Claude 26784371743 (claude): TWO create_pull_request_review_comment items had target=* with NO pull_request_number ('Messages 8,9 failed: Target is "*" but no pull_request_number specified'); those 2 failed items red-failed the job despite other smoke outputs succeeding. NEW workflow in the class. Class now spans 6 workflows since 05-26 (Contribution Check, Sub-Issue Closer, LintMonster, Smoke Claude + earlier). The common root defect is UNCHANGED: 'Process Safe Outputs' fails the whole job on ANY failed item rather than skip-with-warning when >=1 item succeeded. SECONDARY: target=* with no resolvable number on schedule/non-PR events is structurally unsatisfiable yet emitted repeatedly — validate at the MCP emit boundary so the agent self-corrects in-loop; prompt-only guardrails remain insufficient. FIX (High): (1) make Process Safe Outputs treat individual failed items as skipped-with-warning when >=1 item in the batch succeeded; (2) reject target=* at emit time when context cannot resolve a concrete number.

issues.title: IMPROVED: 25M effective-token cap 429 did NOT recur on 06-01 — heaviest eff_tok was Linter Miner 22.5M (under cap), all heavy workflows stayed below 25M
issues.detail: No 'CAPIError: 429 Maximum effective tokens exceeded' signatures in the 06-01 window. The workflows that hit the cap on 05-30 (Linter Miner) and 05-31 (Daily Firewall Logs) either ran under-cap or did not run: Linter Miner succeeded at 22.53M eff_tok, Copilot Opt 20.23M, Smoke Copilot 20.16M — all below the 25M cap. The mitigation recommendations (scope-chunk heavy daily-aggregation workflows + harness fail-fast on budget-429) remain OPEN as preventives, but severity downgraded high->medium after one clean window. Maps to open #35661. Re-escalate if any workflow re-hits the cap.

issues.title: Did NOT recur on 06-01 — threat-detection prompt.txt missing infra failure not seen this window
issues.detail: No 'ERR_SYSTEM: Prompt file not found at /tmp/gh-aw/threat-detection/aw-prompts/prompt.txt' / 'ERR_PARSE: No THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT' signatures in the 06-01 window. The 05-31 Code Simplifier detection-job failure did not repeat. The harden recommendation (don't mask the cp with '|| true'; verify prompt exists before invoking detection agent) stays OPEN as a preventive since the shared detection harness still exposes every create_pull_request workflow.

issues.title: Did NOT recur on 06-01 — Test Quality Sentinel & Design Decision Gate all passed this window
issues.detail: The 05-31 transient PR-head-branch-deleted race (branch 'copilot/update-agentic-workflows-and-skill-file' missing on remote) did not repeat. Test Quality Sentinel ran 2x and Design Decision Gate ran 3x in the 06-01 window, all SUCCESS. Was external-cause/transient; the optional checkout 'skip-cleanly on deleted branch' guard remains a low-priority noise-reduction idea.

issues.title: WATCH (new): PR Code Quality Reviewer turn-count varied 3->22 (avg 13.8) across 3 runs — unstable task shape or prompt
issues.detail: Observability drift flag: workflow pr-code-quality-reviewer varied from 3 to 22 turns across its 3 runs (all SUCCESS). A 7x turn spread suggests changing task shape (large vs small PRs) or an unstable prompt. No failures; monitor whether the high-turn tail correlates with specific PR sizes and whether it ever times out.

issues.title: Did NOT recur — Go Logger Enhancement absent on 06-01; today's most expensive run was only $2.98 (Daily Code Metrics)
issues.detail: Go Logger Enhancement did not run in the 06-01 window. The 05-31 $8.30/41.9M-eff/117-turn heavy tail did not repeat. Today's cost distribution is flat — top run Daily Code Metrics $2.98, total $15.62 (claude-measured), the lowest claude-measured daily cost in the 14-day window. No cost anomaly.

issues.title: Firewall 19.3% (700/3635), up from 16.7%. Driven by NEW-ENGINE smoke tests; no failure-causing blocks
issues.detail: Block rate 19.3%, up from 05-31's 16.7% — the increase is attributable to new-engine smoke tests added this window (Smoke Antigravity 10/12=83%, Smoke Gemini 23/77, Smoke Copilot 118/325=36%) plus Linter Miner 63/243. Blocks are predominantly (unknown) + Google telemetry (content-autofill.googleapis.com, accounts.google.com, www.google.com), Playwright azureedge, and localhost — browser/telemetry noise, not workflow-affecting. No firewall block caused either of the 2 run failures.

issues.title: RESOLVED/clean: Failure Investigator succeeded on 06-01 (no timeout/early-exit); 2 consecutive clean windows
issues.detail: The [aw] Failure Investigator (6h) completed SUCCESSFULLY this window (29 turns, $2.45) with no 60-min CLI-step timeout and no early-exit failure. Smoke Claude's failure was the unrelated safe-output target=* class, not a CLI timeout. The 05-30 claude/opus CLI-step timeout concern has now had 2 clean windows.

issues.title: Stable: 36 copilot runs, 0 ENOENT / 0 anthropic-beta / 0 model-not-supported errors
issues.detail: Copilot CLI stable across 36 copilot runs. Today's only copilot failure (Contribution Check) was the safe-output target=* class, not a CLI harness regression.

issues.detail: The 06-01 window introduced Smoke Antigravity (antigravity engine), Smoke Gemini (gemini engine), and Smoke Pi (pi engine), all SUCCESS.
